app.title: Echoverse
app.tagline: Describe a world. Listen to it come alive.
onboarding.welcome.title: Welcome to Echoverse
onboarding.welcome.subtitle: Before your first audio adventure, we need a few API keys.
onboarding.welcome.privacy: This app runs entirely in your browser. Your keys are stored locally and never uploaded to any server.
onboarding.llm.title: Configure LLM Service
onboarding.elevenlabs.title: Configure ElevenLabs
onboarding.turbopuffer.title: Configure turbopuffer
onboarding.turbopuffer.hint: Get it from the turbopuffer.com console
onboarding.complete.title: All Set!
onboarding.complete.saved: All configuration saved securely in your browser.
home.features.interactive.title: Interactive Stories
home.features.audio.title: AI-Generated Audio
home.features.audio.desc: Every sound custom-made for your story
home.features.adaptive.title: Adaptive Engine
home.quickstart: Write a story premise → Put on headphones → Immerse in your story
create.title: Create Your Story
create.premise.label: Story Premise
create.premise.placeholder: An astronaut wakes up alone on an abandoned space station. She needs to repair the communications system to call for rescue, but something else seems to be on the station...
create.premise.noApiKey: Please configure your LLM API key in Settings first
create.premise.genFailed: Failed to generate premise, please check your API configuration
create.tags.title: Choose Your Story Elements (optional, multi-select)
create.tags.customPlaceholder: Type a custom tag, press Enter to add...
create.duration.title: Story Duration
player.endConfirm: Are you sure you want to end the story? The AI will generate a natural conclusion.
player.freeText: Or type what you want to do...
end.title: Journey Complete
history.title: Story History
history.empty: No stories yet. Create your first adventure!
history.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this story?
settings.title: Settings
settings.clearConfirm: This will delete all settings, stories and cached audio. You'll need to set up again. Continue?
